questions.question: Which dentists in Seattle Wa are open on weekends?
questions.answer: Dentists in Seattle Wa with weekend hours include: Gentle Dental (Sat: 08:00-16:00), Eastside Modern Dentistry (Sat: "by appointment"), Best Smiles Dentistry (Sat: 08:00-14:00), Redmond Way Dentistry (Sat: off), Prime Dental (Sat: 08:00-16:00). 5 total with weekend availability.
